dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I am the master of my fate; I am the captain of my soul. William Ernest Henley.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Teacher, that's too many! It's too early for that! That's going to be exhausting...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What's with that look? If Shinwoo runs 1 lap, others can run 3 laps.

dialogue.speaker: SHINWOO
dialogue.line: I guess I'll do it. I've got stamina.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I am the master of my fate; I am the captain of my soul. William Ernest Henley.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I must be aging. My body's not what it used to be. Who made this field so large?

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Class is about to start, so get back to your classrooms if you're done!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Did, did you just get here???

summary: Shinwoo Han is late for class and is assigned 5 laps as punishment. Despite complaints from other students, Shinwoo accepts the challenge, showing his resolve and stamina, while an older character (possibly the teacher) struggles with the physical exertion.
